case_title: ALL-CAL COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. VS. PEGGY A CLARK et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALL-CAL COLLECTION SERVICES, INC.
